name: lacadev/about-craft-block
title: About — Foundation of Craft
description: Section ảnh editorial (4/5) + glass card + text giới thiệu triết lý thương hiệu

specText.default: Sustainable Walnut sourced from managed European forests.

paragraph1.default: At CURATED, we believe that furniture is the architecture of the internal landscape. Our process begins with the raw material, honoring the soul of wood, the strength of stone, and the tactility of leather.

paragraph2.default: Every piece is a testament to the intersection of modern technology and ancestral hands. We partner with multi-generational workshops where the "Standard of Excellence" is not a goal, but a heritage.
